offer: For medical clinic administrators processing 10–20 claims/month, frequent claim denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate scheduling and confirming resubmissions instead of manual tracking and resubmission of claims.
problem: Frequent claim denials leading to delayed reimbursements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinic administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical clinic administrators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among administrators
try_it: Let users try manual claim entry and status tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
